name: instant-worker — propagation_runner saw an unknown kind (api/worker image skew)
description: P1 warning — fires per-tick the moment an unknown pending_propagations kind appears, rather than waiting ~24h for the eventual dead-letter at maxAttempts exhaustion (which would trigger the higher-severity propagation-dead-lettered alert above). Modal cause: an old worker pod is running a stale image while the api has already started enqueuing a newer kind. Symptom: instant_propagation_unknown_kind_total{kind=...} > 0 for >5m. Fix: `kubectl rollout status deploy/instant-worker -n instant-infra` and confirm pod image SHA matches deploy/instant-api. The api enqueued the row in good faith, propagationHandlers does not yet contain the kind — finish the rollout. Source: worker/internal/metrics/metrics.go (PropagationUnknownKindTotal), emit site worker/internal/jobs/propagation_runner.go.

nrql.query: SELECT sum(instant_propagation_unknown_kind_total) FROM Metric WHERE metricName = 'instant_propagation_unknown_kind_total' FACET kind
